journey.name: Wallet receive address
journey.description: Generates a receive address on the Wallet screen and verifies it renders with its QR code, without crashing - exercising first-run wallet creation and BIP84 address derivation end to end.

actions.action: Launch the Mandacaru app and wait for the splash screen to dismiss (poll until nav_node is present)
Verify the balance card (wallet_balance_card) is displayed
Verify a receive address (wallet_receive_address) is displayed and starts with "bc1", "tb1", or "bcrt1"
